code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(a)
  while i < n
    match list.get(a, i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v)
        if not list.contains(result, v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while list.len(remaining) > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut min_idx = 0
    match list.get(remaining, 0)
    when Some(v)
      min_val = v
    when None
      ()
    end
    mut i = 1
    let n = list.len(remaining)
    while i < n
      match list.get(remaining, i)
      when Some(v)
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
          min_idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, min_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if j != min_idx
        match list.get(remaining, j)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if list.len(sorted) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let m = list.len(sorted)
  while k < m
    match list.get(sorted, k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
